title: cyrtopera tisserantii
intro: Cyrtopera tisserantii, also known as Tisserant's Cyrtopera, is a species of orchid found in tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyrtopera tisserantii include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, Cyrtopera tisserantii is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a dried powder to make teas, tinctures, or capsules.
